message:
feat(connectors): accurate cache-aware token cost calculation

Anthropic connector cost calculation improvements:
- Implement proper Anthropic cache pricing model:
  - Cache writes: 25% more expensive than base input (1.25x multiplier)
  - Cache reads: 90% cheaper than base input (0.10x multiplier)
  - Uncached input: base rate
- Calculate uncached_input by subtracting cache_creation and cache_read
  tokens from total input_tokens
- Use saturating_sub to handle edge cases where cache tokens might
  exceed reported input_tokens (defensive against API inconsistencies)

OpenAI connector cost calculation improvements:
- Add PromptTokensDetails struct to capture the new cached_tokens field
  from OpenAI's API response (available since late 2024)
- Implement OpenAI cache pricing: cached tokens are 50% discounted
- Calculate cost breakdown: uncached at full price, cached at half price
- Handle missing prompt_tokens_details gracefully with unwrap_or(0)

These changes ensure accurate cost tracking for cache-enabled workflows,
which can significantly reduce costs (up to 90% for Anthropic cache hits,
50% for OpenAI cache hits).

Dependency additions:
- Add chrono dependency to connector Cargo.toml files for timestamp
  handling in tests and token expiry calculations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
